segments.text: SALLY:Oh, PETER, there you are.
segments.translation: 莎莉：噢，Peter，原来你在这儿啊。

segments.text: You've been ages. What kept you so long?
segments.translation: 已经过了很长时间了。什么事情耽搁了？

segments.text: PETER:I'm sorry I'm so late, SALLY.
segments.translation: 彼得：对不起，我迟到了，Sally。

segments.text: Have you been waiting long?
segments.translation: 你等很久了吗？

segments.text: SALLY:Oh, half an hour.
segments.translation: 莎莉：噢，半小时了。

segments.text: But it doesn't matter.
segments.translation: 但不要紧。

segments.text: I've had a coffee and I've been reading this guidebook for tourists.
segments.translation: 我喝了杯咖啡，还一直在读游客指南。

segments.text: Sit down. You look very hot and tired.
segments.translation: 快坐。你看起来很热又累。

segments.text: What would you like to drink?
segments.translation: 想喝点什么？

segments.text: PETER:I'd love a really chilled mineral water or something.
segments.translation: 彼得：我真想来点儿冰镇矿泉水什么的。

segments.text: Will you have another coffee?
segments.translation: 你要再来一杯咖啡吗？

segments.text: SALLY:Yes. I will. The waitress will be back in a moment.
segments.translation: 莎莉：是的。服务员一会儿就回来。

segments.text: Why were you so late?
segments.translation: 你为什么迟到了？

segments.text: Did something happen?
segments.translation: 发生了什么事吗？

segments.text: PETER:Yes. You know I went to the bank to cash some travellers cheques?
segments.translation: 彼得：是的，我去了银行兑现旅行支票。

segments.text: Well, the exchange rate was looking healthy, but when I went to the teller, they told me the computer system was temporarily down, so they couldn't do any transactions.
segments.translation: 汇率之前看起来很好，但我去了之后柜员告诉我电脑系统暂时出现故障，因此无法进行任何交易。

segments.text: They said the problem would be fixed in a few minutes, so I waited.
segments.translation: 他们说问题一会儿就可以解决，所以我等着。

segments.text: And then I started talking to another guy in the bank, and I forgot the time.
segments.translation: 然后我开始和另一个在银行的伙计聊天，忘了时间。

segments.text: SALLY:Oh, really?
segments.translation: 莎莉：哦，真的吗？

segments.text: Someone you met in the bank?
segments.translation: 你在银行遇见的人？

segments.text: Does he work there?
segments.translation: 他在那里工作吗？

segments.text: PETER:No, he was a tourist, from New York.
segments.translation: 彼得：不，他是游客，从纽约来的。

segments.text: His name's Henry, and he's been here for a week, but he's moving on to Germany tomorrow.
segments.translation: 他的名字是Henry，他在这儿已经一周了，但他明天要去德国。

segments.text: He's an architect, and he's spending four weeks travelling around Europe.
segments.translation: 他是一个建筑师，他准备花四周时间在欧洲旅行。

segments.text: SALLY:Just like us!
segments.translation: 莎莉：就像我们一样！

segments.text: PETER:Yeah, just like us.
segments.translation: 彼得：是的，就像我们一样。

segments.text: He told me the names of some places where we should eat.
segments.translation: 他告诉我了一些该去的餐厅的名字。

segments.text: Great food, and not too expensive, he said.
segments.translation: 他说那里的食物好吃而且不太贵。

segments.text: Oh, and he also gave me this map of the bus system.
segments.translation: 哦，它还给我了个公交系统地图。

segments.text: He said he didn't need it anymore.
segments.translation: 他说他不需要了。

segments.text: SALLY:That's useful. Pity he's moving on tomorrow.
segments.translation: 莎莉：这很有用。真遗憾他明天就走了。

segments.text: Ah, here's the waitress. Let's order.
segments.translation: 啊，女服务生来了，我们点餐吧。

segments.text: Do you want anything to eat, or shall we just have a drink?
segments.translation: 你想吃点什么吗？还是我们就只喝点东西？

segments.text: PETER:Well. I'm hungry, and we've got a lot of sightseeing to do, so let's just have a snack and a drink.
segments.translation: 彼得：好的。我饿了，而且我们要逛很久。所以来点儿小吃和饮料吧。

segments.text: SALLY:Sounds good to me.
segments.translation: 莎莉：这听起来不错。

segments.text: PETER:Well, let's decide what we'll see today.
segments.translation: 皮特：嗯，让我们来决定我们今天游览什么。

segments.text: I guess the best place to start is the Cathedral, and then the Castle.
segments.translation: 我觉得最好的游览起点是教堂，然后是城堡。

segments.text: What are the opening times for those two?
segments.translation: 那两个的开放时间是什么时候？

segments.text: SALLY:Well, according to this guidebook, the Cathedral is only open from nine-thirty in the morning until midday.
segments.translation: 莎莉：嗯，根据游览指南，教堂只从早上9：30分开放到中午。

segments.text: No. hang on. That's the Cathedral Museum.
segments.translation: 哦，不，等等，那是教堂博物馆的开放时间。

segments.text: The Cathedral itself is open morning and afternoon.
segments.translation: 教堂本身在早上和下午开放。

segments.text: The Castle is just open from one to five, so we can't go there until after lunch.
segments.translation: 城堡只从下午一点开到五点，所以我们直到吃过午餐后才能去。

segments.text: I really want to spend some time in the Art Gallery, because they've got this wonderful painting by Rembrandt that I've always wanted to see.
segments.translation: 我真的想花点时间待在艺术画廊，因为那里有我想一睹为快的伦勃朗的画。

segments.text: PETER:What else should we see?
segments.translation: 皮特：我们还应该去看什么？

segments.text: SALLY:Well, the guidebook says the Botanical Gardens are worth spending some time in, and they're open all day, from eight to six, so we can go there any time.
segments.translation: 莎莉：嗯，游览指南说植物园值得一花时间一去。那里全天8点到6点开放，所以我们随时可以去。

segments.text: I'd like to go to the Markets near the river too, but... oh ... no, wait, that's only in the mornings, too.
segments.translation: 我也想去河边的市场，但是...哦，不行，那只在早晨开。

segments.text: PETER:As well as today and tomorrow, we can see some other places on Monday, you know.
segments.translation: 皮特：不仅是今天和明天，我们可以在周一去看更多的地方。

segments.text: But I don't think the Markets will be open then: they only open on Thursdays, so we've missed them for this week.
segments.translation: 但是我觉得那是市场不会开。他们只在周四开。所以我们这周要错过了。

segments.text: Maybe we should go to the Cathedral today because it's Sunday tomorrow, and even though it's open every day it might be more difficult to get in tomorrow because of the church services.
segments.translation: 也许我们今天应该去教堂，因为明天是周日，即使它每天开放，明天也可能因为礼拜仪式更难进去。

segments.text: SALLY:That's true, but the Art Gallery isn't open on Sundays at all, so we'll have to go there today.
segments.translation: 莎莉：嗯，是的。但是艺术画廊周日根本不开，所以我们今天必须去。

segments.text: The Castle's open every day except Mondays, so we're OK there, and the Gardens of course only close at night.
segments.translation: 城堡除了周一每天都开放。所以那里是可以的，当然花园晚上是不开的。

segments.text: PETER:Are all these places free or do we have to pay to go in?
segments.translation: 皮特：所有这些地方都免费吗？还是需要付钱进去？

segments.text: What does the guidebook say?
segments.translation: 旅游指南上怎么说？

segments.text: SALLY:I think there's a charge for all of them except the Botanical Gardens.
segments.translation: 莎莉：我觉得除了植物园，其他都是收费的。

segments.text: Oh, and the Markets, of course you don't pay to go in.
segments.translation: 哦，还有市场，当然你不用花钱进入。

segments.text: PETER:OK, well, it looks like our plan is this: we'll go to see the painting you like first, the Rembrandt, then have lunch and go on to the Castle after that, and then the Cathedral.
segments.translation: 彼得：好吧，嗯，看来这就是我们的计划了。我们将会去看油画，你喜欢的先来，伦勃朗之类的，然后吃午饭，去城堡，最后去教堂。

segments.text: SALLY:OK. It says here that the roof of the Cathedral is really beautiful.
segments.translation: 莎莉：好的，听说教堂的穹顶非常漂亮。

segments.text: PETER:Is that right?
segments.translation: 彼得：真的吗？

segments.text: What I really want to do at the Cathedral is climb the tower.
segments.translation: 但是我真的想去教堂爬塔。

segments.text: The view is supposed to be spectacular.
segments.translation: 据说景色壮观极了。

segments.text: SALLY:OK, well, that'll be more than enough for today.
segments.translation: 莎莉：好吧，这样今天就足够了吧。

segments.text: Then, tomorrow, let's go to the Botanical Gardens and have a picnic.
segments.translation: 那么明天我们去植物园野餐吧。

segments.text: I want to sit by the river and watch the swans.
segments.translation: 我想坐在河边看着天鹅。

segments.text: This city's famous for them.
segments.translation: 这座城市因此而出名。
